name: Demiurge Ema
name_jp: デミウルゴス<ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭＡ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エマ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can send 4 monsters with 2400 or more ATK and 1000 DEF from your hand, Deck, and/or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 Spell/Trap on each field; destroy them, then Special Summon 1 "Homunculus Token" (Fairy/LIGHT/Level 2/ATK 800/DEF 800) to both players' fields in Defense Position, and if you do, this card gains 1600 ATK. You can only use each effect of "Demiurge Ema" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can send 4 monsters with 2400 or more ATK and 1000 DEF from your hand, Deck, and/or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 Spell/Trap on each field; destroy them, then Special Summon 1 "Homunculus Token" (Fairy/LIGHT/Level 2/ATK 800/DEF 800) to both players' fields in Defense Position, and if you do, this card gains 1600 ATK. You can only use each effect of "Demiurge Ema" once per turn.
eff: You can send 4 monsters with 2400 or more ATK and 1000 DEF from your hand, Deck, and/or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 Spell/Trap on each field; destroy them, then Special Summon 1 "Homunculus Token" (Fairy/LIGHT/Level 2/ATK 800/DEF 800) to both players' fields in Defense Position, and if you do, this card gains 1600 ATK. You can only use each effect of "Demiurge Ema" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons Tokens to your opponent's field
